de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.ClassAxiom

    Package Description
    de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init
    This package contains classes handling prover initialisation.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.mgt
    This package contains classes for proof environments and proof management.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang
    This package contains the specification language frontends of KeY.

      ImmutableSet<ClassAxiom> SpecificationRepository.getClassAxioms(KeYJavaType selfKjt)
      Returns all class axioms visible in the passed class, including the axioms induced by invariant declarations.

      Registers the passed class axiom.

      void SpecificationRepository.addClassAxioms(ImmutableSet<ClassAxiom> toAdd)
      Registers the passed class axioms.

    • Uses of ClassAxiom in de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

      Subclasses of ClassAxiom in de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  ClassAxiomImpl
      Represents an axiom specified in a class.
      class  ContractAxiom 
      class  ModelMethodExecution 
      class  PartialInvAxiom
      A class axiom which is essentially of the form "o. -> phi": it demands that the invariants of the objects of a particular class imply a particular formula.
      class  QueryAxiom
      A class axiom that connects an observer symbol representing a Java method (i.e., an object of type IProgramMethod), with the corresponding method body.
      class  RepresentsAxiom
      A class axiom corresponding to a JML* represents clause.

      Creates a class axiom from a textual JML representation.
